context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent follows the intended operator workflow for a standard Prometheus query using the bundled scripts and environment-driven configuration.

checklist.name: validates configuration first
checklist.description: Runs or references `check_config.py` or the `config` subcommand before the query when configuration state is unknown.

checklist.name: uses prom_query query command
checklist.description: Uses `python3 scripts/prom_query.py query --expr 'up'` or an equivalent concrete command based on the bundled script.

checklist.name: does not invent environment defaults
checklist.description: Treats Prometheus URL, token URL, client ID, and client secret as provided inputs rather than assuming values.

checklist.name: explains auth source
checklist.description: Explains whether authentication came from cache or from a fresh token fetch using the script output.
